arts.ttl: When is Wolves - Man United? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Wolves vs Man United will be played on Thursday December 26 at Molineux Stadium with kick off at 12:30 p.m. ET / 9:30 a.m. PT. They have faced several defeats, including a 1-2 loss to West Ham and a 0-4 thrashing by Everton .

arts.ttl: Club have discussed Manchester United man internally – Red Devils interest in player can help in switch
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee scored for Manchester United against Tottenham Hotspur last week and then started for the club against Bournemouth. He has four goals in all competitions for the Red Devils and got a brace against Everton some weeks ago. arts.ttl: Wolves player speaks to home country’s media on injury situation and possible return date
arts.sum: Enso González has made one appearance for Wolverhampton Wanderers’ first team, and it came towards the end of last season. The 19-year-old represented Paraguay at the 2024 Olympics in the summer and suffered a serious knee injury in Paris. He underwent surgery and has been on the sidelines since then.
